display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
discover tests: language_cats, builtin_cats, annexB
skip _FIXTURE.js helpers

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 1: parse YAML frontmatter, partition
CLEAN tests (plus previous t262_partial entries)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
admission: flags async/module/raw,
UNSUPPORTED_FEATURES, intentional exceptions

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 2: execute CLEAN in batched workers
slowest-batch-first dispatch from timing TSV

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 2b: retry batch-lost tests individually
(rescue bystanders co-batched with a crash)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 3: evaluate vs expected
negative tests, async $DONE, diagnose fast-path

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 4 (--batch-only): retry regressions individually;
recovered => classify PARTIAL, rewrite t262_partial.txt

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
--update-baseline gate:
batch-lost=0 AND crash-exits=0 AND
regressions=0 AND passing >= STABLE_BASELINE_MIN
